raw_text: Sadak me bahut bada gaddha hai Malihabad crossing ke paas, roz accident hota hai
Deep pothole near Malihabad crossing causing daily near-accidents, please fix urgently
Nearest PHC is 9km away from our village in Malihabad, pregnant women struggle to reach in emergencies
Baar baar flood ho raha hai Chinhat me, ghar me pani aa jata hai monsoon me
Chinhat area floods every monsoon, no drainage system, water enters homes
School building in Nagram has cracked walls, unsafe for children
Bakshi Ka Talab me bijli baar baar jaati hai, transformer kharab hai
Frequent power cuts in Bakshi Ka Talab, faulty transformer needs replacement
Garbage not collected for two weeks in Sarojini Nagar sector 3
Irrigation canal broken in Mohanlalganm farms, crops drying up before harvest
